name: com.energyaisolution/energyai
description: Free energy intelligence for agents: incentives, solar estimates, node scores, installer routing.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: OPTIONAL. check_incentives, estimate_production, get_node_score, and route_lead need NO key at all. Bearer <ENERGYAI_API_KEY> (register free at https://api.energyaisolution.com/api/v1/merchant/register) unlocks billed tools and earns the 20% route_lead conversion bounty.
